Summarize Population-Level Immunization Metrics

Source: R/summarize_population_metrics.R
summarize_population_metrics.Rd

This function summarizes patient-level population immunization metrics (created by population_metrics()) across evaluation years, optionally returning results in long or wide format. Metrics are grouped by evaluation year (e.g., age 2 for CIS, age 13 for ADOL).

Usage

summarize_population_metrics(
  patients,
  visits,
  years,
  metrics_of_interest = NULL,
  id_col = "STUDY_ID",
  dob_col = "DOB",
  verbose = TRUE,
  output_format = c("long", "wide")
)

Arguments

patients

A data.table of patient-level records that has already been processed by population_metrics() (contains metric columns and attached attribute population_metric_definitions).

visits

A data.table of patient visits including at least STUDY_ID and VISIT_DATE.

years

A numeric vector of evaluation years to include in the summary.

metrics_of_interest

Character vector of metric names (e.g., "HEDIS_ADOL2", "UTD_CIS10"). These must exist as columns in patients. If not specified, will return all possible metrics on the patient table.

id_col

Column name in patients identifying unique patients. Default is "STUDY_ID".

dob_col

Column name in patients containing date of birth. Default is "DOB".

verbose

Logical; if TRUE, progress messages are printed. Default is TRUE.

output_format

Either "long" (default; stacked rows with metric labels) or "wide" (one row per year, metrics as columns).

Value

A data.table summarizing the requested metrics:

  • In "long" format: one row per metric-year with counts, percents, and metric labels.

  • In "wide" format: one row per evaluation year, columns for each metric.

Details

Evaluation age is inferred from the metric name:

  • CIS metrics ("CIS") → evaluated at age 2

  • ADOL metrics ("ADOL") → evaluated at age 13

  • All other metrics → default to age 18
